prompts_findings.prompt_lead:
Start by reading the files. No plan or preamble.

Review this session and update

risks_fired.evidence: Lead-in 'Start by reading the files. No plan or preamble.' suppresses plan-mode opening; residual is a brief reading-narration sentence before the file-write.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Existing 'No plan or preamble' lead-in already neutralises most of the risk. Body callout below the prompt could optionally name 'expect a brief reading sentence; the file-write and read-back are the teaching beats.'

risks_fired.evidence: Tell me in 1-5 lines: what changed in `./CLAUDE.md`, which scoreboard row or adjudicated claim drove it, what future agents must do differently, and which claim shape you are LEAST confident you caught correctly.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Debrief carve-out applies — concrete evidence surfaces named, artifact-quote read-back required, body prose names the pushback move. Residual is low.

risks_fired.evidence: which claim shape you are LEAST confident you caught correctly
risks_fired.fix_hint: Debrief carve-out applies — least-confident forcing function is well-targeted; trailing body prose 'Read Claude's summary. Push back where it's wrong' names the recovery move.

risks_fired.evidence: Touch ONLY that section; preserve every other section verbatim.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Team-scope file with explicit preserve boundary; body prose names the boundary-only-edit pattern as one of the two enforced moves.

risks_fired.evidence: If a Groundedness checks section already exists, edit the rules in that section in place; do not add a new subheading or parallel list.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Explicit integrate-in-place language present; risk addressed in-prompt.
